programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: A former NFL player and his wife are shot dead in Houston while they sleep; with no signs of an intruder, suspicion falls on their 16-year-old son; charged with capital murder and facing life in prison, their son faces an intense legal battle.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: When a mother is found fighting for her life at the bottom of the stairs of her home, suspicion falls on her firefighter husband; the prosecution alleges she was the victim of a devastating assault.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: When a wife shoots her husband, the investigation reveals their private nightmare; charged with premeditated murder, the wife now faces life in prison, but her defense team argues that she acted in self-defense after experiencing years of abuse.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: A 68-year-old father shoots and wounds his daughter's boyfriend when the couple arrives outside the family home; believing his daughter is trapped in an abusive relationship, he fires three shots to force the boyfriend to leave.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead in his office in 2005, no arrests are made. An employee helps police with their investigations. He says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder. Is he a cold-blooded murderer or an innocent employee?

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl shoots her boyfriend dead with a vintage gun when he plays a prank on her; was this a tragic accident or an angry overreaction to the prank?

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: A young father and his family come under attack at a busy drive-thru; terrified of his aggravated assailant, and with his young baby and girlfriend also trapped in the car, he fires his gun and allegedly injures an innocent bystander.

programme.title: The Killing of JonBenet: The Truth Uncovered
programme.desc: Key evidence and information in the 1996 murder of 6-year-old beauty queen JonBenét Ramsey sheds new light on who may have been responsible for the crime; John Ramsey discusses his daughter's death in a sit-down interview.

programme.title: Hunting JonBenét's Killer: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Elizabeth Vargas takes a fresh look at the most notorious cold-case murder in American history as new leads are tracked and new DNA tests are conducted; featuring an exclusive interview with John Ramsey, as well as many never-before-seen photos.

programme.title: Scott Peterson: The New Evidence
programme.desc: Part 1/2. More than 20 years after the tragic deaths of Laci and Conner Peterson, multiple petitions filed by Scott Peterson's defense team have introduced additional points of new evidence that may challenge key aspects of the case; while the latest petition is currently moving through the appeals process, it continues to raise significant questions and could impact public understanding of the ca

programme.title: Scott Peterson: The New Evidence
programme.desc: Part 2/2. Chris Pixley investigates a controversial burglary theory and new scientific evidence that challenge the prosecution's case against Scott Peterson; as he digs deeper into the Los Angeles Innocence Project's claims, he seeks to answer two questions: Does Peterson deserve a new trial and did he commit the murders?
